title: Digital Property Assets
description: Websites and domains are real assets. This is the practice of building, buying, and managing a portfolio of digital properties that compound in value over time.
intro: Most people treat their websites like a cost. Something to maintain, maybe grow, and mostly worry about. That is the wrong frame. A domain is a piece of internet real estate. A website with real traffic and real content is a revenue-generating asset. A portfolio of aligned properties is a compounding system. This section covers how to build, value, and manage digital properties the way a serious asset holder would.

seo.title: Digital Property Assets ... Krisada.com
seo.description: How to build, value, and manage a portfolio of websites and domains as compounding digital assets.
